title: The Dark Corridor
content: Every evening, the corridor outside Emma's apartment became unusually dark. One night, she decided to investigate with her neighbor. After checking the lights, they discovered that a small tree outside the building had grown enough to block the hallway window. The branches prevented sunlight from entering during the afternoon. A gardener trimmed the tree the following week, and the corridor became bright again. The mysterious darkness had been caused by nature rather than anything unusual.
